paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.32 as of July 23, 2026, representing a 3.95 percent decrease from the prior close and a 20.9 percent decrease over the last 21 sessions. There have been 3 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include discussions of Project Matador, a 17-gigawatt AI campus in the Texas Panhandle, with sources such as Environment America and NewsChannel 10 on MSN reporting on the project's potential impact on the region's water supply. Another headline from PR Newswire announces the admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights for Fermi Inc.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including an 8-K form announcing the appointment of four new officers, an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, and an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There has been one Form 4 filing and no Form 144 filings.
